title: Workstation Recipe Exporter
description: Provides mod authors with more convenient visual recipe editing
body:
## Overview
1. The inspiration source of the mod: [Crafting Recipe Exporter](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/18157.html)
2. Provides more convenient visual recipe writing for mod hackers. Suggested to be paired with [kubejs](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/2450.html) carry out the use

## Usage method
- /re <workstation_type>
- /recipeexporter <workstation_type>
- /recipeexporter <+The corresponding work block IDs below open different interfaces.>
- [example: /recipeexporter furnace]
